sentence: A cunninlinguist who cannot legaculate is just a man who chose his words well and still arrived late.

wombos.definition: To make a prediction or analysis so accurate that it feels prophetic. Used as a verb: 'he legaculated that outcome months ago,' 'she legaculated the whole situation.'

Someone masterfully skilled at putting words together — a cunning, precision-level wombo deployer. The highest tier of bangpoundulary. 'That cunninlinguist will deliver the quiche peanemis with no analvisions.'
